addressLine1.description: Line 1 of the street address for the merchant location. Usually includes the street number and name.

addressLine2.description: Line 2 of the street address usually an apartment number or suite number.

cashbackMaximumAmount.description: Maximum cashback amount permitted at the location.

countryCode.description: Two digit alpha country code as defined in ISO

countrySubdivisionCode.description: Code of the state or province for a merchant location.

countrySubdivisionName.description: Name of the state or province for a merchant location.

city.description: The name of the city for a merchant location.

distance.description: This is the numerical value for the distance from the provided location to the selected merchant.

distanceUnit.description: This is the unit of measure value for the distance from the provided location to the selected merchant. Options are KM and MILE.

isPayPassConcession.description: Boolean value which indicates if the concession area is equipped with a PayPass card reader.

isPayPassPharmacy.description: Boolean value which indicates if the pharmacy is equipped with a PayPass card reader.

isPayPassFuelPump.description: Boolean value which indicates if the fuel pump is equipped with a PayPass card reader.

isPayPassTollBooth.description: Boolean value which indicates if the toll booth is equipped with a PayPass card reader.

isPayPassDriveThrough.description: Boolean value which indicates if the drive thru is equipped with a PayPass card reader.

isPayPassRegister.description: Boolean value which indicates if the register is equipped with a PayPass card reader.

isPayPassTicketing.description: Boolean value which indicates if the ticketing area is equipped with a PayPass card reader.

isPayPassVendingMachine.description: Boolean value which indicates if the vending machine is equipped with a PayPass card reader.

isRepowerByCardSwipeSupported.description: Boolean value which indicates if the repower card load type at this merchant supports Card Swipe.

isRepowerByMoneyPakSupported.description: Boolean value which indicates if the repower card load type at this merchant supports MoneyPak.

postalCode.description: The postal code of the Merchant location.
